title: XXL Big Silver Letter T Mylar Helium Balloons 40 Inch Giant Single Foil Balloon Birthday Party Decoration Supply Baby Shower (Silver T)
features: [AMAZING PHOTO PROP ] It is a huge size and beautiful and unique metallic color visual effects.
[PEMIUM QUALITY] Premium aluminum foil alphabet balloon is thickened.It can be used repeatedly, automatic sealing.
[FLOAT WITH HELIUM?] Yes.40 Inch jumbo letter balloon can fill up with helium and can float.

[FABULOUS PARTY DÉCOR] Silver large alphabet foil balloons are perfect for birthdays, photoshoots, weddings, bridal showers, baby showers, birthday parties, gender reveals, photo backdrop and so on!---Letter balloons will make any occasion fabulous and refine.
description: About Big Eye Owl Welcome to our large balloon series.We are committed to developing creative products for you to make your party more interesting and beautiful.We have many cute number balloons and letter balloons.Can provide a comprehensive choice for your party decoration. ABOUT BALLOON Color: Silve Size: 40 inch Material: Foil Words/Phrases Listed Below to Inspire Your Party Planning: HAPPY BIRTHDAY ONE XOXO I LOVE YOU ITS A BOY ITS A GIRL OH BABY HAPPY NEW YEAR TACO TUESDAY TACO BOUT TIME FIFTY FORTY KING QUEEN BRIDE PRINCE PRINCESS MR&MRS YOU AND ME ROAR CONGRATS Balloon Tips: A foil balloon can appear deflated in cold air, but it will fill out when warmed up. Do not expose foil balloons to extreme heat or they can burst. How To Inflate The Myla Silver Balloons: Find out the inflatable mouth in the middle of the transparent sheet. Insert a straw or a gas pump into the inflatable mouth. Inflate the balloon slowly and gently till 80% full. Pinch its mouth tightly for a while, waiting for self-sealing. For more party supplies please search “Big Eye Owl”. Have an amazing party!
